dialogues.text: I want everything settled before the end of the week. Here's what we owe you. Forty.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. I've always run a clean operation. I want that to hold.
dialogues.no_response: It'll be here. I'm not going anywhere.

dialogues.text: I heard from HR. I'm not going to ask questions. But take this. Forty.
dialogues.yes_response: You were one of the good ones. I don't say that to many people.
dialogues.no_response: I'll hold it. Come back for it when you're ready.

dialogues.text: There's outstanding pay from last quarter. I want it in your hands. Forty.
dialogues.no_response: I'll put it in an envelope with your name on it. It's not going anywhere.

dialogues.text: You've put in good work. More than I let on. Take the forty.
dialogues.yes_response: I should've said it while it mattered more. That's on me.
dialogues.no_response: Your call. But know it was earned.

dialogues.text: I'm squaring up accounts. I don't leave things unfinished. Forty.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. That's how I've always run things.
dialogues.no_response: It's yours either way. I'll make sure of that.

dialogues.text: I covered something on your behalf. I don't want reimbursement. Just — take the forty.
dialogues.yes_response: Don't make it sentimental. Just take it.
dialogues.no_response: Stubborn. That's not always a virtue. Come back for it.

dialogues.text: There's a thing people don't say enough in this business. You mattered. Take the forty.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. Now don't make me say anything else.
dialogues.no_response: The money doesn't expire. The sentiment neither.

dialogues.text: I've been doing this a long time. You learn to see when things are winding down. Forty.
dialogues.yes_response: Go. While you still can. That's not nothing.
dialogues.no_response: The offer doesn't close. Whenever you're ready.

dialogues.text: Final pay period. I ran the numbers twice. Here's your forty.
dialogues.yes_response: Good luck. I mean that in a way that doesn't require explanation.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. I'll note it. It doesn't disappear.

dialogues.text: Take this. Don't tell me you're fine. Just take the forty and go see whoever you need to see.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. That's the right call. I wish I'd made more of those.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. But I hope you reconsider what you're spending your time on.
